label: Creation - constrained recipe
promptText: Create a single-serving, high-protein lunch salad under 300 kcal with ingredients, step-by-step instructions, and calories per serving.

questions.label: What matters most in the first draft?
questions.helper: Pick the first quality bar the next prompt should optimize for.

questions.label: What should the next prompt lock down first?
questions.helper: Pick the first thing the next prompt should make explicit.

answers.answer: Keep the salad easy to make on a weekday.
